description: SharePoint is Microsoft’s collaboration and document-management platform for intranets, team sites, lists, and files in Microsoft 365. SharePoint Online tenant content is hosted on tenant-specific `sharepoint.com` sites and is also accessible through Microsoft Graph.
summary: SharePoint exposes a tenant-scoped SharePoint REST API, SharePoint resources through Microsoft Graph REST, and the CLI for Microsoft 365; all require Microsoft Entra-based authentication.
